E&S is not a valid market type for WC, CA, DB, PL, UM, UP, CX, or CP.
PAAZGU10 is only valid for the E&S market type.
The sum of the amount field in the mgtrans table for a policy code should equal the sum of prem_amt from the fact_policy_transaction table for a policy code.
The sum of the fsamount field in the mgtrans table for a policy code should equal the sum of fsa_amt from the fact_policy_transaction table for a policy code.
The sum of the paamount field in the mgtrans table for a policy code should equal the sum of paa_amt from the fact_policy_transaction table for a policy code.
The sum of the sf3amount field in the mgtrans table for a policy code should equal the sum of sf3_amt from the fact_policy_transaction table for a policy code.
The sum of the sf4amount field in the mgtrans table for a policy code should equal the sum of sf4_amt from the fact_policy_transaction table for a policy code.
The sum of the sf5amount field in the mgtrans table for a policy code should equal the sum of sf5_amt from the fact_policy_transaction table for a policy code.
The sum of the sf6amount field in the mgtrans table for a policy code should equal the sum of sf6_amt from the fact_policy_transaction table for a policy code.
The sum of the sf7amount field in the mgtrans table for a policy code should equal the sum of sf7_amt from the fact_policy_transaction table for a policy code.
The sum of the commisamt field in the mgtrans table for a policy code should equal the sum of  comm_amt from the fact_policy_transaction table for a policy code.
The sum of the nocommprem field in the mgtrans table for a policy code should equal the sum of non_comm_prem_amt from the fact_policy transaction table for a policy code.
Only WC and BP policies will have a gov_bus_class_key.
E&S is not a valid market type for WC, CA, DB, PL, UM, UP, CX, or CP.
PAAZGU10 is only valid for the E&S market type.
Only WC and BP policies will have a gov_bus_class_key.
E&S is not a valid market type for WC, CA, DB, PL, UM, UP, CX, or CP.
PAAZGU10 is only valid for the E&S market type.
Only WC and BP policies will have a gov_bus_class_key.
Agcy_status should be C4 when a date exists in agcy_closed_date.
When carrier_nm is AZGUARD, the carrier_type should be Non-Admitted; otherwise, the carrier_type should be Admitted.
When the dateterm field is not null, active should be 0.
Policy_effec_start_dt should not be after policy_effec_end_dt.
Policy_coverage_start_dt should not be before policy_effec_start_dt.
Policy_coverage_end_dt should not be after policy_effec_end_dt.
When the status of an agency is S2, C4, I5, P1, V1, agcy_status should be Active, Closed, Inactive, Preferred Broker, and VCAP, respectively.
Agcy_closed_date should not be null when agcy_status is Closed.
Field extra in table mgnotrans must adhere to data type string
The combination of bus_class_cd_bus_key, bus_class_suffix_bus_key, bus_class_src_id_bus_key in table dim_business_class must be unique
Is_expiring_flag should only be 1 or 0
Is_renewable_flag should only be 'Y','N', or 'U'
Is_prev_policy_ubetag_flag should only be 1 or 0
Is_cloned_flag should only be 1 or 0
Nb_submitted_count should only be 1 or 0
Nb_quoted_count should only be 1 or 0
Nb_issued_count should only be 1 or 0
Expiring_count should only be 1 or 0
Expiring_renewable_count should only be 1 or 0
next_policy_quoted_count should only be 1 or 0
Rn_issued_count should only be 1 or 0
Rn_issued_dwnpymnt_recd_count should only be 1 or 0
Src_trans_id_type should only be 1 or 2
